subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God, Who hath unlocked the door of the hidden treasure and hath showered forth His grace, both manifest and concealed [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی قد فتح باب الکنز المخفی و افاض بالفیض الجلی و الخفی علی
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @high station of the true believer, @spiritual transformation
